test.title: In-memory mock transport for testing without a live server

info.description: Openwhyd is a free and open-source music curation service that allows users to create playlists of music tracks from various streaming platforms (YouTube, SoundCloud, Vimeo, Deezer…) and to discover the music posted by other users. The API provides two main APIs: the Data Export API for downloading public data without authentication, and the User API for authenticated interactions with user accounts.
info.title: Openwhyd API
